phases.label: SymPy Basics
phases.description: Symbolic algebra, calculus, and equation solving.

topics.label: Symbols & Expressions
topics.description: symbols(), Expr, simplify. Define symbolic variables and manipulate expressions.

topics.label: Calculus
topics.description: diff, integrate, limit, series. Symbolic differentiation and integration.

topics.label: Solving Equations
topics.description: solve, solveset, linsolve. Solve algebraic and differential equations.

topics.label: Matrices
topics.description: Matrix operations, eigenvalues, determinants, and decompositions.

topics.label: Printing & LaTeX
topics.description: pretty print, latex(), and code generation for C/Fortran/Python.
